name: @a2h/cli
description: Convert text to a self-contained HTML file via local agent CLIs (claude / qoder), zero-runtime-deps
author: pengxiao

scripts.test:build: esbuild src/__tests__/extract-html.test.ts src/__tests__/errors.test.ts src/__tests__/render.test.ts src/__tests__/skills.test.ts src/__tests__/invoke.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outdir=dist-test --external:node:*
scripts.test: npm run test:build && npm run test:fixtures && node --test --enable-source-maps dist-test/extract-html.test.js dist-test/errors.test.js dist-test/render.test.js dist-test/skills.test.js dist-test/invoke.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run sync && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
